input.personalStatement: Growing up in Accra, I taught myself Python at 14 and built a mobile app helping 200 local market traders. I founded Code4Africa, training 180 students in programming. My AI research was presented at the African AI Symposium 2026.

applicants.scenario: SCHOLARSHIP MATCH — Below GPA cutoff, strong alternatives

input.personalStatement: As the first woman from my village to attend university, I lead the Women in Engineering chapter at IIT Bombay with 120 members. My capstone project designed a low-cost water purification system now deployed in three rural villages.

applicants.scenario: HIGH FRAUD — Impossible GPA + AI-generated essay

input.personalStatement: I am a highly motivated student with excellent leadership skills and strong academic performance. I have participated in many extracurricular activities and community service projects. I believe in the importance of education and I am committed to making a positive difference in the world.
